nodes.text:
**Journal Entry: October 20**
**BlissTrack™ Metric: 88% (Optimized)**

It is very difficult to find the words to describe the Gold Tier. It is a golden hum. It’s like there’s a sun inside my skull and it’s shining on everything I think about. I looked at a gray brick wall for three hours today and I cried because the texture was so profoundly satisfying.

nodes.text: Dr. Tanaka came by. She wanted to run some cognitive tests. She asked me to solve a series of syllogisms. I told her that logic feels like walking through mud when you could just fly. Why do I need to know if "All B are C" when the very thought of the letter 'B' sends a ripple of velvet ecstasy down my spine?

nodes.text: She looked worried. She said my vocabulary is tightening. She said I’m using fewer adjectives. I told her I only need one adjective: *Good*. Everything is so, so good. The NeuraBless™ interface keeps popping up in my peripheral vision, offering "Extreme Euphoria Upgrades" for a limited-time offer. I clicked 'Yes' on all of them. My bank account is empty, but my dopamine receptors are overflowing. Who needs a "portfolio" when you have a "dividend" this high?

Total engagement with the physical environment has dropped by 80%. He no longer requires solid food; our NeuraBless™ Nutrient-Slurry (Strawberry-Zest Flavor™) provides all necessary caloric intake while triggering a secondary "Digestive Delight" pulse. nodes.text:
**Journal Entry: November 2**
**BlissTrack™ Metric: 96% (Ultra-High)**
Tanaka came again. She was loud. She said, "Arthur, you aren't eating. You're just vibrating."

I tried to tell her about the colors. Not the colors I see with my eyes, but the colors the wire makes in my head. They are bright. They are like fire but they don't burn. They just... they just *wow*.

nodes.text: She asked me what I remembered about my mother. I thought about it. The memory started to feel sad, like a cold wind. But then the NeuraBless™ felt the cold and it gave me a big, warm hug in my brain. The sad went away. The mother-thought turned into a sugar-thought. Now my mother is just a warm, pink taste in my mouth.

nodes.text:
**Journal Entry: November 12 (Written on a napkin)**
**BlissTrack™ Metric: 99% (Saturated)**
The lady came. The Tanaka lady. She said Arthur, come back.
I am here. I am in the hum. The hum is big.
The wire feels like a kiss. A kiss that never stops.

phrases.text: The wire feels like a kiss.

nodes.text: I tried to say a big word today. I tried to say... *con-se-quence*. But the wire didn't like it. The wire gave me a little zap of "No-No" and then a big wave of "Yes-Yes."

I like the ads. The ads are bright. The ads tell me I am a good boy. I am a Joy-Pioneer.

nodes.text: Dr. Tanaka said I am losing my "self." I looked in the mirror. I saw a face. It was smiling. If the face is smiling, the "self" is happy. That is the math. The NeuraBless™ math.
